title: senna multijuga subsp. multijuga
intro: Senna multijuga subsp. multijuga is a plant species in the legume family, commonly known as a variety of senna. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its seeds, leaves, and roots, which contain anthraquinone glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Senna multijuga subsp. multijuga include its laxative properties, which can help treat constipation and promote digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, capsules, and powders, and are often used to support bowel health and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).
